caveats: Requires custom Spark configuration and cross-cloud networking

caveats: Requires custom Spark configuration and cross-cloud networking

google-dataproc:statistics:v2.notes: Full column statistics support via Spark on Dataproc. Writes min/max, null counts, value counts to manifest files. Supports compute_table_stats procedure for Puffin-based NDV statistics.

google-dataproc:statistics:v3.notes: Column statistics fully supported via Spark on Dataproc with Iceberg V3

google-dataproc:bloom-filters:v2.notes: Full bloom filter support via Spark on Dataproc. Parquet-level bloom filters configurable via write.parquet.bloom-filter-enabled.column.* table properties. Also supports compute_table_stats procedure for Puffin-based statistics.
caveats: Requires setting bloom filter table properties per column

google-dataproc:bloom-filters:v3.notes: Full bloom filter support via Spark on Dataproc with Iceberg V3
caveats: Requires setting bloom filter table properties per column

google-dataproc:type-promotion:v2.notes: Full type promotion support via Spark on Dataproc, same as OSS Spark: int to long, float to double, and decimal precision widening via ALTER TABLE ALTER COLUMN TYPE.

google-dataproc:type-promotion:v3.notes: Full type promotion support via Spark on Dataproc for V3 Iceberg tables.

google-dataproc:snowflake-horizon-catalo.notes: Dataproc runs Spark and supports REST catalog natively. Configure with spark.sql.catalog.<name>.type=rest pointing to the Horizon Catalog endpoint.
V3 support via Dataproc Spark requires iceberg-spark-runtime 1.7.0+.
caveats: Requires iceberg-spark-runtime 1.7.0+ for V3 table support

google-dataproc:deletion-vectors:v2.notes: Deletion vectors are a V3 feature; not applicable to Iceberg V2

google-dataproc:deletion-vectors:v3.notes: Supported via Spark on Dataproc with Iceberg V3 deletion vectors (Puffin files) for efficient row-level deletes.
